job.jd_raw: Director - Program Management at Inception. Full-time. Abu Dhabi, UAE. Posted 3 days ago. Role leads program management functions within an AI company. Involves structuring and governing multi-track delivery programs, stakeholder management, and ensuring strategic alignment of technical programs. Full JD requires authenticated LinkedIn access.

research.company_summary: Inception is a G42-backed AI company in Abu Dhabi building foundation models and AI products. Ahmed has Director Delivery application active (Feb 27). Director Program Management is a distinct PMO leadership role, different from both Director Delivery and Director Technology.
recent_news: Inception is hiring a full leadership layer simultaneously across Technology, Program Management, Delivery, and International Sales
G42 accelerating AI commercialization across GCC
research.notes: Posted 3 days ago, still active. Third Inception role discovered alongside Director Technology (19h) and Director Delivery (already applied Feb 27). PMO angle is Ahmed's strongest credential set. Source: LinkedIn aggregator. No official Inception career page confirmed. Treat as verified-aggregator.

cv.tailoring_notes: Emphasize: (1) Enterprise PMO from ground up at Network International (300+ projects, 8 countries), (2) $50M TopMed program management (15 hospitals, Saudi German Health), (3) PMP + CSM + CSPO certifications, (4) AI program governance (14 AI agents in production, multi-vendor coordination). Strong PMO narrative that maps directly to managing AI product programs.

flags: Already have active Director Delivery application at Inception (Feb 27). This is a 3rd Inception role. Highest ATS of the three new Inception roles (88%). PMO credentials are strongest fit.
nasr_review.recommendation: Dropped, unverified direct job URL. Re-scan required with direct job URL only
